tags.name: mc-badge
tags.description:
Attributes:

  * `appearance` {BadgeAppearance} - The appearance of the component.

  * `variant` {BadgeVariant} - The appearance of the component.

  * `display` {BadgeDisplay} - The display of the badge.

  * `position` {BadgePosition} - The position of the badge.

  * `distance` {BadgeDistance} - The offset of the badge from the parent component.

  * `fit` {BadgeFit} - The fit of the component.

  * `max` {number} - Caps the value of the badge. Will show + if value is greater than max.

  * `label` {number | string} - The number of notifications displayed in the badge.
If the value is greater than 99, the badge will display +99.

Properties:

  * `appearance` {BadgeAppearance} - The appearance of the component.

  * `variant` {BadgeVariant} - The appearance of the component.

  * `display` {BadgeDisplay} - The display of the badge.

  * `position` {BadgePosition} - The position of the badge.

  * `distance` {BadgeDistance} - The offset of the badge from the parent component.

  * `fit` {BadgeFit} - The fit of the component.

  * `max` {number} - Caps the value of the badge. Will show + if value is greater than max.

  * `label` {number | string} - The number of notifications displayed in the badge.
If the value is greater than 99, the badge will display +99.
